calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To May-10-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice (Other) (Notices)
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:47:08 a.m. and concluding at 10:20:07 a.m.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank, N.A. appearing represented by Molly O'Toole, Esq.
Defendant Bizon Group, Inc. not appearing.

DAVID MIKULECKY is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's Counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

DAVID MIKULECKY is examined by the Court.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's justification for attorney fees.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

After review, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff American Express National Bank N.A., and against Defendant Bizon Group, Inc., as follows:

Damages: $66,639.07
Prejudgment Interest: $387.96
Attorney Fees: $3,000.00
Costs: $873.15

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $70,900.18

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
